positioning.value: Unlock the full potential of AI‑driven growth with our expert development services, tailored to prop‑tech, fintech, and e‑commerce.

segments.demographics: Founders / CTOs at proptech startups or mid-size real estate firms, 30-50 yrs, 10-200 employees
segments.psychographics: Wants to digitise property listings, automate lead follow-up, build buyer-facing AI tools; frustrated by generic dev shops with no real estate domain knowledge
pain_points: Dev agencies deliver generic apps with no real estate context
Long build cycles — 6-12 months to MVP
High cost of hiring in-house AI engineers
buying_triggers: Fundraise completed, now need to build fast
Board pressure to show tech differentiation

segments.demographics: VP Product / CTO / Founders at fintech startups — lending, payments, wealth management, 50-500 employees
segments.psychographics: Needs AI/ML features — fraud detection, credit scoring, document OCR, chatbots — without building an AI team from scratch
pain_points: AI talent is expensive and hard to retain
Integration with legacy banking infrastructure is complex
buying_triggers: RBI/SEBI mandate requiring AI audit trail
Series B milestone — need AI differentiation for next raise

segments.demographics: Co-founders, CTOs, or Head of Tech at D2C / ecommerce brands scaling past ₹10Cr ARR, ₹10Cr-₹200Cr GMV
segments.psychographics: Wants personalisation, AI-driven recommendations, automated inventory and pricing tools to compete with Meesho/Flipkart at smaller scale
pain_points: Shopify/WooCommerce plugins don't scale for custom AI needs
Customer LTV dropping — no personalisation layer
Manual catalogue management eating ops bandwidth
buying_triggers: Scaling past ₹10Cr ARR — need tech moat
Just hired a CTO — looking to upgrade stack
Raised funding, investor pushing for tech differentiation

value.name: Successive Technologies
value.positioning: Full-stack product engineering for startups and enterprises
value.weakness: Less AI-specific, more traditional dev shop

value.name: Appinventiv
value.positioning: Mobile and web app development with AI

value.name: ValueCoders
value.weakness: Staff augmentation model — no product ownership

value.name: Tata Elxsi
value.positioning: Design and technology services including AI
value.weakness: Too big for startups, slow and expensive

value.name: Persistent Systems
value.weakness: Minimum deal size too high for early-stage startups

Prop-Tech.value: Accelerate property sales with AI‑powered apps, delivering faster valuations and smarter transactions.

Fintech.value: Revolutionize financial services with AI‑driven features, enhancing security and user experience.

Ecommerce.value: Unlock AI‑powered personalization, driving revenue growth and customer loyalty.

AI Consulting & MVP Sprint.value: Validate AI potential in 4‑8 weeks, and discover new opportunities for growth.

messaging.value: Empower your business with AI‑native development solutions, designed to drive growth and innovation in prop‑tech, fintech, and e‑commerce.

value.evidence: Primary channel for reaching CTOs and Founders in India
Effective for targeting professionals and decision‑makers
Wide reach and cost‑effective for lead generation
Long‑term strategy for organic growth and thought leadership
